hub.intro: Manage users, roles, and permissions in one place. System roles are read-only; custom roles can be edited in the permission catalog.
hub.cardUsersDescription: Create users, assign roles, reset passwords, and deactivate accounts.
hub.cardRolesDescription: Create custom roles and maintain permissions per role.
hub.cardMatrixDescription: See roles, UI access (POS/Admin), and permission groups at a glance.
hub.accessDeniedDescription: You need at least user.view to open this area.

matrix.intro: Overview of all roles in the tenant. System roles are product-defined and not editable.
